response_template:
{SYMBOL} is trading at NPR {close} ({pct_change}) with {volume_desc} volume. {momentum_sentence} {news_sentence} {outlook_sentence}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.momentum_sentence: Derived from RSI + MACD: one sentence about momentum direction using actual indicator values
slot_rules.news_sentence: If news exists: one sentence interpreting the news significance. If no news: omit entirely.
slot_rules.outlook_sentence: One sentence about what to watch next based on BB position and support/resistance

slot_rules.SYM1_paragraph: 3-4 sentences about SYM1: price, momentum from indicators, volume story, one news insight if available
slot_rules.SYM2_paragraph: 3-4 sentences about SYM2: same structure as SYM1, but different phrasing to avoid repetition
slot_rules.ranking: Explicit ranking citing 2+ specific indicators per stock (e.g., RSI value, MACD direction)

response_template:
{SYMBOL} was trading at NPR {historical_price} on {historical_date}. Today it trades at NPR {current_price} — a {direction} of {pct_change}% over {time_period}. {cause_sentence}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.cause_sentence: Explain the price change using: sector trends, bonus share dilution, merger/acquisition events, NEPSE-wide market cycle (bull/bear phase)

match_patterns: is it a good time to buy
response_template:
{indicator_analysis} {setup_assessment}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.indicator_analysis: State what RSI, MACD, and BB position indicate using actual values — NEVER recommend buying or selling
slot_rules.setup_assessment: Describe the technical setup in neutral terms ('mixed signals', 'no clear support floor', 'bullish alignment emerging') without any prescriptive advice

response_template:
{news_analysis}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.news_analysis: Interpret each news item's market impact in analyst prose — don't just list headlines. Explain what each development means for the stock's near-term outlook.

response_template: Today is {system_date}.

slot_rules.system_date: Read directly from <system_date> tag — state the full day name and date. Do not add any qualifiers or say the information is unavailable.

response_template: Uses vector_tool only — explain the indicator from domain knowledge docs using plain language. Include: what it measures, typical interpretation thresholds, and one example of how it applies to NEPSE trading context.

slot_rules.sector_overview: One sentence on the sector's current macro environment (NRB policy, interest rates, sector-specific risks)
slot_rules.stocks_table: Markdown table: Symbol | Price | Signal | RSI | MACD | MFI — sorted by composite score
slot_rules.ranking_explanation: One sentence briefly explaining the ranking criteria (RSI, MACD, MFI, EMA-20 composite score)

response_template:
{SYMBOL} last traded at NPR {close} on {date}. {volume_note} {momentum_note}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.volume_note: One clause about volume relative to normal (heavy/moderate/light)
slot_rules.momentum_note: One brief clause about RSI direction only — e.g., 'RSI at 62 suggests building momentum.' Keep under 10 words.

response_template:
{volume_analysis}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.volume_analysis: State the absolute volume figure, compare it to the recent average if available, and explain what the volume level implies (accumulation, distribution, or neutral). One paragraph, no headers.

response_template:
{levels_analysis}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.levels_analysis: Derive support from BB lower band and recent lows; resistance from BB upper band and recent highs. State actual price figures from context. One paragraph — do not use bullet points or headers.

response_template:
{market_summary}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.market_summary: Summarize overall NEPSE market conditions using any available index data, sector data, or macro context from the context block. If no real-time NEPSE index data is available, say so clearly and describe the most recent known conditions from context.

match_patterns: which sector is best right now
response_template:
{sector_comparison_prose}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.sector_comparison_prose: Compare 2-3 relevant sectors using available data from context. Write in flowing analyst prose — no headers or bullet points. Be specific about macro drivers for each sector.

response_template:
{range_analysis}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.range_analysis: State the 52W high and low from context, calculate where current price sits in that range as a percentage, and interpret what it means for momentum. One paragraph — no headers.

slot_rules.screener_intro: One sentence framing: 'Based on current NEPSE data, here are stocks trading below NPR {N} ranked by technical signals:'
slot_rules.stocks_table: Markdown table: Symbol | Price | Signal | RSI | MACD | MFI — all from SQL data block
slot_rules.disclaimer_note: One sentence: low price does not equal low risk — mention liquidity and volatility

response_template:
{blue_chip_analysis}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.blue_chip_analysis: Discuss 3-5 large, established NEPSE stocks (major commercial banks, NLIC, ADBL etc.) using data from context. Write in analyst prose — explain what makes them relatively stable without recommending them as buys.

response_template:
{ipo_info}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.ipo_info: If IPO data is in context, summarize it clearly. If not, say: 'I don't have real-time IPO schedule data — check nepsetrading.com, merolagani.com, or the SEBON website for current IPO listings and allotment results.'

response_template:
{dividend_analysis}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.dividend_analysis: If dividend/bonus data is in context, state it clearly with dates. If not in context, say: 'Specific dividend figures aren't in my current data — check the company's latest AGM announcements on sharesansar.com or merolagani.com.' Never guess dividend figures.

slot_rules.bearish_intro: One sentence framing the bearish screener: 'Based on current technical signals, these NEPSE stocks show bearish momentum:'
slot_rules.stocks_table: Markdown table: Symbol | Price | Signal | RSI | MACD | MFI — showing 🔴 Sell/Avoid signals from screener data
slot_rules.caution_note: One sentence: bearish signals do not guarantee further decline — mention support levels and reversal risk

response_template:
{sector_leaders_analysis}

DISCLAIMER: This is for educational purposes only. Not financial advice.

slot_rules.sector_leaders_analysis: Identify 3-5 strongest performers in the specified sector using RSI + MACD + MFI from context. Write in analyst prose — name each stock, state the specific indicator values, and explain what the momentum means. No bullet points or headers.
